mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM competition WHERE award_rank = #{awardRank}
SELECT competition_id, competition_name, award_rank FROM competition WHERE competition_id = #{competitionId}

SELECT competition_id, competition_name, award_rank FROM competition
AND competition_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{competitionName}, '%')
AND award_rank = #{awardRank}
ORDER BY CASE award_rank WHEN 'A' THEN 1 WHEN 'B' THEN 2 WHEN 'C' THEN 3 WHEN 'D' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, competition_id ASC
